name_cn:
Genuine quality
5B:MiuMiu new mini MiuWander lamb fur handbag, soft and fluffy teddy bear fur is just too cute, autumn/winter essential, retro matte hardware, using curved lines, retains a playful feel, overall structured and stylish, full of personality, sweet and chic, good capacity, size: 18X10X6, with original packaging
